crons.name: daily-status-report
crons.prompt: Generate a daily status report and send it to Telegram. Include: number of sessions today (check sessions.db), skill lifecycle status (run: python3 infrastructure/message-gateway/skill-lifecycle.py status), and any drift alerts from activity.log. Format as a concise Telegram message and send via send-telegram.sh.

crons.name: weekly-skill-cleanup
crons.prompt: Run skill lifecycle sweep: python3 infrastructure/message-gateway/skill-lifecycle.py promote. Then run python3 infrastructure/message-gateway/skill-lifecycle.py scan. Report results to Telegram. Also clean up sessions older than 30 days from sessions.db.
